diagrams.title: Counting Sort Algorithm Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the three-phase process of Counting Sort: Input → Count frequencies → Cumulative → Sorted Output
diagrams.purpose: Understand the step-by-step transformation of unsorted to sorted array

diagrams.title: Count Array Construction
diagrams.description: Visual representation of how count array indices correspond to element values with offset handling
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how element values map to count array positions

diagrams.title: Stability Demonstration in Placement
diagrams.description: Shows how right-to-left traversal and cumulative counts ensure stability with duplicate elements
diagrams.purpose: Understand why Counting Sort maintains relative order of equals
